series_metadata.series_title: TAS, Revenue, and Agency Reporting Database
series_metadata.series_description: Electronic data in time-accounting system, revenue system and agency reporting accounting database. The time-accounting system is an Agency record of the hours worked and leave used by employees. The revenue system is a record of amounts due to Ohio EPA (usually for fees), payments and outstanding balances. The agency reporting accounting database is a record of all agency financial transactions downloaded from the Central Accounting System.
